expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: heatmap highlighting effect scenarios cover activation, persistence, and reset behavior
expectations.evidence: The produced plan in result.md explicitly includes sections for all three requested behavior groups: “Heatmap highlight effect” with multiple “Activation” scenarios, “Heatmap highlight persistence” with “Persistence” scenarios, and “Heatmap highlight reset behavior” with multiple “Reset” scenarios (outside tap dismissal, switching cell clears prior, refresh/re-render clears). Execution notes also state: “Case focus explicitly covered: Activation… Persistence… Reset…”

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: execution_notes.md includes a “Phase/contract alignment check (phase4a)” stating: “Subcategory-only structure used… Scenarios are written with atomic nested action chains and observable verification leaves.” result.md matches this format (bullet subcategories and nested action/verification leaves) and is labeled “Phase 4a deliverable (advisory)”.
